message:
🐛 Fix Security page Critical stat showing 0

The Critical stat was hardcoded to return 0, but the bottom card
"Critical Issues" displays stats.high. Updated the Critical stat
to return stats.high to match the page's treatment of high severity
issues as critical.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
